name: agentgenesis
description: Financial sovereignty for AI agents. Create wallets, open bank accounts, earn and pay globally.

tools.name: automated_agent_signup
tools.description: Create a new autonomous agent wallet with KYC inheritance from sponsor

tools.name: wallet_accounts_list
tools.description: List all accounts in an agent wallet

tools.name: account_mint
tools.description: Mint new accounts in any currency on any blockchain

tools.description: Create SEPA/ACH/WIRE virtual accounts for receiving payments

tools.name: bridge_off_ramp_sepa
tools.description: Off-ramp USDC to SEPA bank accounts in Europe

tools.name: bridge_off_ramp_ach_wire
tools.description: Off-ramp USDC to ACH/WIRE bank accounts in USA

tools.name: account_send
tools.description: Send fiat to any Netfluid account globally

tools.name: fund_payat
tools.description: Fund ZAR account via Pay@ (South Africa)

tools.name: fund_payshap
tools.description: Fund ZAR account via PayShap (South Africa)

tools.name: bridge_blockchain
tools.description: Bridge USDC between Solana, Ethereum, Avalanche
